版本日历 Version Calendar

1.1 Dreamwalk Corridor活动日历：拉克莉莫萨、Chaos、向阳岛、地下赛车场与方斯双倍优先级 Version 1.1 Dreamwalk Corridor Calendar: Lacrimosa, Chaos, Sunward Island, Underground Circuit and Fons Rush

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-26 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：13 分钟Read time: 13 min

攻略速览

1.1「Dreamwalk Corridor」计划于 2026 年 6 月 3 日上线，已公开内容包括新剧情 Dreamwalk Corridor、新地区向阳岛与回声回廊、新 S 级角色 Lacrimosa 与 Chaos、保时捷 918 Spyder 联动、Pegasus Residence 房产、Bagel SNS、Fight Club、Underground Circuit、Mist Pursuit 高风险委托和多期活动。由于活动密集且时间错开，最重要的不是同时全开，而是按日期把不可延期奖励、抽卡决策、探索资源和双倍收益拆开处理。

前置条件与接取方式

版本上线

2026-06-03，1.1 Dreamwalk Corridor 开启

上半角色

Lacrimosa 限定池 2026-06-03 至 2026-06-24

下半角色

Chaos 限定池 2026-06-24 至 2026-07-08

1.1优先级日历

按关闭时间决定先后

1

6月3日：先领码和开活动入口

兑换 DREAMWALK0603、TOMATO100、RACENOLIMIT，并确认活动商店

三个公开兑换码有效期到 6 月 25 日。版本第一天先处理兑换码、邮件、维护补偿、活动入口和新地区传送点，避免后续被剧情、抽卡和探索分散注意力。

2

6月3日至24日：Lacrimosa池先观望半天

试用、剧情体验和实战反馈都看完再决定是否抽

Lacrimosa 为 Chaos 属性、Liquid 弧盘适配，定位偏输出。若账号缺主C或需要新属性核心，优先级较高；若已有成型主C且资源紧，应等实测循环、专属弧盘和活动环境稳定后再投入。

3

6月3日至8日：先清长线活动框架

What’s Baking、Underground Circuit、Sunward Travelogue、The Long Dream 先开进度

这些活动覆盖到 7 月 8 日，不必第一天刷空，但需要尽早解锁入口和日/周目标。向阳岛探索建议先点传送、收集主线相关谕石，再等查漏路线成熟。

4

6月8日至15日：方斯双倍优先

Fons Rush 期间把城市体力倾斜到高收益 Hethereau Hobbies

方斯双倍是明确短窗口收益。6 月 8 日前不要把城市体力随手耗光在低优先级项目，双倍期开销大的玩家应优先补角色升级、车辆、房产和经营所需资金。

5

6月24日至7月8日：Chaos与后半活动再分配

看上半抽卡结果决定是否转向 Chaos、Fight Champions 和 Pixel Surge

Chaos 池、Fight Champions 和 Pixel Surge 在后半段接力。若上半已消耗大量环石，下半应优先拿活动奖励与通用资源；若保留预算，再评估 Chaos 是否补足队伍缺口。

版本资源风险

活动同时开导致优先级失控

1.1 的内容量集中在新剧情、新地区、双角色池、车辆联动、经营玩法和多期活动。没有日历规划时，最容易出现兑换码过期、双倍体力错过、抽卡过早清空和探索反复跑图。

  • 兑换码、邮件、活动商店和限时入口永远先于可随时补的探索查漏。
  • 角色池按 6月3日至24日、6月24日至7月8日分段做预算，不要第一天把 1.1 全部环石花完。
  • 方斯双倍窗口只有 6月8日至15日，应提前保留城市体力和高收益经营项目。

完成奖励

兑换码 Lacrimosa预算 Chaos预算 向阳岛探索 方斯双倍 地下赛车场 保时捷联动

1.1 的正确打开方式是先拿不可逆奖励，再按时间线推进长线活动，最后根据实测决定抽卡深度。6 月 3 日不要急着把所有资源砸进单一目标，6 月 8 日至 15 日的方斯双倍和 6 月 24 日后的后半池都需要预算。

完整解析

Dreamwalk Corridor 是开服后第一个大版本，信息量远高于普通小活动。新剧情、新地区、新角色、保时捷联动、地下赛车场、Fight Club、Bagel SNS 和多期奖励活动会同时抢时间。最实用的攻略不是罗列内容，而是告诉你哪件事会过期、哪件事可以延后。

6 月 3 日当天建议按固定顺序处理：更新后先领邮件和维护补偿，再兑换三个公开码，接着打开所有活动入口，最后推进新剧情和向阳岛传送网络。不要一上线就沉迷抽卡或探索，否则很容易漏掉商店、任务入口和限时领取。

抽卡上，Lacrimosa 与 Chaos 分别覆盖上半和下半。Lacrimosa 上半先来，适合缺新输出核心或想补 Chaos 属性体系的玩家；Chaos 下半接力，适合保留预算、需要新机制角色或等完整实测后再行动的玩家。普通玩家最重要的是给两个池子分别设预算，不要让上半情绪消费透支下半选择权。

资源上，6 月 8 日至 15 日的 Fons Rush 是最明确的高收益窗口。方斯长期被角色升级、车辆、经营和房产持续消耗，双倍期间的城市体力价值会高于普通刷取。想买车、补房产或冲经营等级的玩家，应把这一周当成版本经济节点。

探索上，向阳岛和回声回廊第一天只需要先打通主线入口、传送点和活动要求点。100% 查漏可以等地图点位、社区路线和自身队伍强度稳定后再做，避免在新版本前两天被垂直点位和隐藏目标拖住主活动进度。

Guide Snapshot

Version 1.1 Dreamwalk Corridor is planned for June 3, 2026. Announced content includes the Dreamwalk Corridor episode, Sunward Island, Corridor of Echoes, S-Class characters Lacrimosa and Chaos, Porsche 918 Spyder collaboration, Pegasus Residence, Bagel SNS, Fight Club, Underground Circuit, Mist Pursuit and multiple events. Because many activities overlap, the key is to separate expiring rewards, pull decisions, exploration and double-income windows by date.

Requirements and Entry

Version start

June 3, 2026

First-half banner

Lacrimosa from June 3 to June 24

Second-half banner

Chaos from June 24 to July 8

1.1 Priority Calendar

Let closing dates decide priority

1

June 3: claim codes and open events

Redeem DREAMWALK0603, TOMATO100 and RACENOLIMIT.

The revealed codes expire on June 25. On day one, claim mail, compensation, event entries and early teleports before deep farming.

2

June 3-24: test Lacrimosa before pulling deep

Use trials, story experience and early feedback first.

Lacrimosa is a Chaos-attribute damage character with Liquid Arc compatibility. She is higher priority for accounts lacking a new carry, but conservative players should wait for rotation and Arc data.

3

June 3-8: unlock long-term event tracks

Open What’s Baking, Underground Circuit, Sunward Travelogue and The Long Dream.

These last until July 8, so do not rush full completion on day one. Unlock entries, daily or weekly goals and Sunward Island teleports first.

4

June 8-15: prioritize Fons Rush

Spend City Stamina on high-value Hethereau Hobbies during the double-Fons window.

This is a short, clearly valuable economy window. Save some city stamina and route your money needs around it.

5

June 24-July 8: reassess for Chaos and second-half events

Use first-half pull results to decide Chaos, Fight Champions and Pixel Surge.

If Lacrimosa consumed your budget, focus on event rewards and universal resources. If you saved, evaluate whether Chaos fixes a real team gap.

Version Resource Risk

Too many events, no priority

Version 1.1 stacks story, areas, banners, vehicle collaboration, city systems and events. Without a calendar, players can miss codes, double income and second-half choices.

  • Codes, mail, event shops and limited entries outrank exploration cleanup.
  • Budget separately for June 3-24 and June 24-July 8 instead of spending all Annulith on day one.
  • Fons Rush runs June 8-15, so prepare City Stamina and high-profit hobbies ahead of time.

Rewards

Redeem codes Lacrimosa budget Chaos budget Sunward Island exploration Double Fons Underground Circuit Porsche collaboration

The best 1.1 opening is to claim irreversible rewards first, open long-term event tracks, and decide pull depth after practical testing. June 8-15 Fons Rush and the June 24 second-half banner both need resources left over.

Full Analysis

Dreamwalk Corridor is the first major post-launch version and contains more than a normal event patch. Story, areas, banners, Porsche content, racing, Fight Club, Bagel SNS and multi-stage rewards all compete for time.

On June 3, use a fixed sequence: claim mail and compensation, redeem codes, open event entries, then progress story and Sunward Island teleports. This prevents early exploration or pulling from hiding time-limited rewards.

Pull planning should split the version into two halves. Lacrimosa arrives first and suits accounts needing a new damage core; Chaos arrives later and rewards players who keep enough budget for second-half information.

Fons Rush from June 8 to June 15 is the clearest economy spike. Fons are used by leveling, vehicles, housing and operations, so the double window is worth planning around.

For Sunward Island and Corridor of Echoes, do only the main route, teleports and event-required points first. Save 100% cleanup until routes and hidden-point information mature.
